articles.title: Rust Workspace 与 Crate 分层
一次请求的端到端链路
Session 持久化、Chat State 与 SQLite Journal
生命周期、公告、崩溃恢复与系统休眠
Event Loop 与副作用调度
Chat View、State 与渲染流水线
流式 Markdown 与 Headless Markdown
终端组件、输入框与 Inline UI
System Prompt、项目规则与配置合并
Sampling Wire Types 与模型目录
上下文压缩与 Token 预算
跨会话 Memory、检索与 Dream
子 Agent、后台任务与 Resolution
Computer Hub Core、SDK 与 MCP Adapter
Workspace Execution、VCS、FS Events 与 Gix Status
Remote Workspace Client 与 Wire Types
Shared Foundations：配置、环境、路径与 Shell Base

crates.name: ptyctl
crates.description: Headless PTY controller built on alacritty_terminal
crates.role: 控制无头伪终端、屏幕状态和子进程生命周期。

crates.name: ptyctl-cli
crates.description: CLI for ptyctl headless PTY controller
crates.role: 控制无头伪终端、屏幕状态和子进程生命周期。

crates.name: xai-acp-lib
crates.role: 会话运行时层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：未提供 description，职责由公开模块和依赖关系归纳。

crates.name: xai-agent-lifecycle
crates.role: 负责 Agent 定义解析、构建和 system prompt 装配。

crates.name: xai-chat-state
crates.description: Actor-based chat state management for xAI agents
crates.role: 以 actor 所有权维护聊天状态和可订阅的状态投影。

crates.name: xai-circuit-breaker
crates.role: 根据连续故障和恢复探测限制外部请求故障扩散。

crates.name: xai-codebase-graph
crates.description: High-performance code graph generation using tree-sitter queries
crates.role: 使用 tree-sitter query 生成符号和代码关系图。

crates.name: xai-computer-hub-core
crates.description: Transport, ToolRegistry, and resolver abstractions for the xAI Computer Hub
crates.role: 定义 Computer Hub 的传输、注册表和解析器抽象。

crates.name: xai-computer-hub-mcp-adapter
crates.description: Bridge between MCP servers and the xAI Computer Hub, registering MCP-discovered tools as native hub tools.
crates.role: 把 MCP 发现的工具适配并注册为原生 Computer Hub 工具。

crates.name: xai-computer-hub-sdk
crates.description: SDK for the xAI Computer Hub: connection pool, transparent reconnect, tool harness, and tool-server runtime.
crates.role: 提供连接池、透明重连和工具服务器运行时 SDK。

crates.name: xai-crash-handler
crates.description: Cross-platform crash handler (Unix signals + Windows SEH) with startup crash detection
crates.role: 处理跨平台崩溃信号并检测启动期连续崩溃。

crates.name: xai-fast-worktree
crates.description: High-performance git worktree creation using CoW cloning
crates.role: 使用 CoW 克隆快速创建隔离 Git worktree。

crates.name: xai-file-utils
crates.description: Local data collection: per-turn event tracking
crates.role: 工具与工作区层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：Local data collection: per-turn event tracking。

crates.name: xai-fsnotify
crates.description: Local-filesystem event source: single causal stream of semantic FsEvents
crates.role: 把本地文件系统变化归一化为单一因果语义事件流。

crates.name: xai-gix-status
crates.description: Shared gix status helpers: thread budget under RLIMIT_NPROC so produce-worker spawn cannot abort under panic=abort
crates.role: 在进程线程预算内安全执行共享 gix status 扫描。

crates.name: xai-grok-agent
crates.description: Agent builder, definition parsing, and system prompt assembly
crates.role: 负责 Agent 定义解析、构建和 system prompt 装配。

crates.name: xai-grok-announcements
crates.description: Shared announcement types, persistence, and formatting for Grok CLI apps
crates.role: 安全、扩展与运维层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：Shared announcement types, persistence, and formatting for Grok CLI apps。

crates.name: xai-grok-auth
crates.description: Auth dependency-inversion seam: HttpAuth + AuthCredentialProvider traits
crates.role: 通过 trait 提供 HTTP 认证与凭据提供者的依赖倒置接缝。

crates.name: xai-grok-compaction
crates.description: Shared, transport-agnostic compaction engine for Grok chat and Grok Build.
crates.role: 实现与传输无关的上下文压缩、摘要提交和失败回退。

crates.name: xai-grok-config
crates.description: Shared config loading for Grok — grok_home, effective config (requirements > user > managed), TOML merge
crates.role: 加载 requirements、用户与受管配置并执行有序 TOML 合并。

crates.name: xai-grok-config-types
crates.description: Leaf configuration value types for the grok CLI, extracted from xai-grok-shell for dependency inversion.
crates.role: 定义不依赖运行时的叶子配置值类型。

crates.name: xai-grok-env
crates.description: Backend environment presets for the Grok CLI crate family: endpoint URL defaults and env-var test support.
crates.role: 安全、扩展与运维层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：Backend environment presets for the Grok CLI crate family: endpoint URL defaults and env-var test support.。

crates.name: xai-grok-hooks
crates.description: Runtime hook system for Grok — file-based discovery, command execution, and policy enforcement
crates.role: 负责 hook 发现、命令执行、超时和策略拦截。

crates.name: xai-grok-http
crates.description: Shared reqwest HTTP clients and User-Agent construction for the grok CLI.
crates.role: 集中构造共享 reqwest 客户端、User-Agent 和网络默认值。

crates.name: xai-grok-markdown
crates.description: Streaming markdown renderer for terminal UIs
crates.role: 负责流式 Markdown 的增量解析、样式计算和终端呈现。

crates.name: xai-grok-markdown-core
crates.description: Headless markdown analysis sharing Grok Build's exact pulldown-cmark config.
crates.role: 提供与终端渲染器一致的无头 Markdown 解析和结构分析。

crates.name: xai-grok-mcp
crates.description: MCP integration crate. Quarantines rmcp + reqwest 0.13 (rmcp 2.1 requires reqwest >= 0.13.2 while the rest of the workspace uses reqwest 0.12) and owns the MCP credential store and OAuth flow orchestrator.
crates.role: 隔离 MCP 传输依赖并负责 Server 生命周期、凭据和 OAuth 编排。

crates.name: xai-grok-memory
crates.role: 负责跨会话记忆的存储、切分、向量检索和后台整理。

crates.name: xai-grok-mermaid
crates.description: Render Mermaid diagram source to a rasterized PNG behind a swappable engine trait
crates.role: 把 Mermaid 文本通过可替换引擎转换为终端可展示图像。

crates.name: xai-grok-models
crates.description: Default model IDs for the grok CLI, loaded from the embedded default_models.json.
crates.role: Agent 与推理层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：Default model IDs for the grok CLI, loaded from the embedded default_models.json.。

crates.name: xai-grok-pager
crates.role: 承载主 TUI 的状态、事件、Effect、视图和用户输入循环。

crates.name: xai-grok-pager-bin
crates.role: 提供 Grok Build 终端程序的二进制入口与启动参数边界。

crates.name: xai-grok-pager-minimal
crates.role: 提供最小终端客户端，用较小依赖面验证核心交互与降级路径。

crates.name: xai-grok-pager-pty-harness
crates.description: Shared PTY harness + scenario library for xai-grok-pager e2e tests and benchmarks.
crates.role: 提供 PTY 端到端场景、屏幕断言和性能基准所需的测试基础设施。

crates.name: xai-grok-pager-render
crates.role: 负责终端帧、图片覆盖层和渲染后端，将视图状态转为可提交的终端输出。

crates.name: xai-grok-paths
crates.description: Type-safe path wrappers for absolute and relative UTF-8 paths
crates.role: 提供绝对/相对 UTF-8 路径包装并维持路径不变量。

crates.name: xai-grok-plugin-marketplace
crates.role: 解析和管理插件 Marketplace 元数据及扩展来源。

crates.name: xai-grok-sampler
crates.description: Actor-based sampling/inference layer for xAI grok (HTTP streaming + retry, no shell coupling)
crates.role: 以 actor 形式管理模型采样、HTTP 流、重试、取消和领域事件。

crates.name: xai-grok-sampling-types
crates.description: Pure data types for the xAI sampling / chat-completion API layer
crates.role: 定义采样请求、响应和流式事件使用的纯数据类型。

crates.name: xai-grok-sandbox
crates.description: OS-level sandboxing for Grok Build using kernel primitives (Landlock/Seatbelt) via nono
crates.role: 通过操作系统内核机制为工具执行建立最小能力沙箱。

crates.name: xai-grok-secrets
crates.description: Regex sanitizer for Grok Build outbound data (Sentry / Mixpanel / product-event scrubbing)
crates.role: 在遥测和错误上报前识别并清洗可能的秘密材料。

crates.name: xai-grok-shared
crates.role: 安全、扩展与运维层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：未提供 description，职责由公开模块和依赖关系归纳。

crates.name: xai-grok-shell
crates.role: 承载 Leader、Session、Agentic Loop、权限与持久化的主要运行时。

crates.name: xai-grok-shell-base
crates.description: Foundation modules for the grok shell crate family: environment presets, CPU profiling, and process/filesystem utilities.
crates.role: 封装 Shell 家族共享的环境、进程、文件系统和 profiling 基础能力。

crates.name: xai-grok-shell-session-support
crates.description: Session-support modules for the grok shell crate family: managed MCP credential/catalog caching and file-access tracking.
crates.role: 提供 Session 的 MCP catalog、凭据缓存和文件访问跟踪支持。

crates.name: xai-grok-subagent-resolution
crates.description: Subagent configuration resolution: merges persona, role, and spawn-time overrides into a resolved spec
crates.role: 负责 Agent 定义解析、构建和 system prompt 装配。

crates.name: xai-grok-telemetry
crates.description: Telemetry engine: product events + Mixpanel emission + Sentry error reporting for Grok Build sessions
crates.role: 聚合产品事件、Mixpanel 发射和错误上报。

crates.name: xai-grok-test-support
crates.description: Shared test-support for grok-build crates: mock inference server, SSE generators, ACP stdio client, headless runner, env sandbox
crates.role: 集中提供密封测试环境、模拟服务和共享测试工具。

crates.name: xai-grok-tools
crates.description: Grok tools library
crates.role: 实现 Grok Build 可调用的文件、Shell、任务和工作区工具集合。

crates.name: xai-grok-tools-api
crates.description: Protobuf API definitions for Grok tools
crates.role: 维护 Grok 工具的 Protobuf API 定义和生成边界。

crates.name: xai-grok-update
crates.role: 安全、扩展与运维层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：未提供 description，职责由公开模块和依赖关系归纳。

crates.name: xai-grok-version
crates.description: Lockstepped grok CLI version.
crates.role: 安全、扩展与运维层的一方 crate；上游清单描述为：Lockstepped grok CLI version.。

crates.name: xai-grok-voice
crates.description: Voice dictation (streaming STT) for Grok Build CLI
crates.role: 提供流式语音转文字和输入草稿更新能力。

crates.name: xai-grok-workspace
crates.description: Core host-local workspace library (FS, VCS, execution, discovery) for xai-grok-shell and remote sampler
crates.role: 提供本地主机工作区的文件、VCS、命令执行和项目发现能力。

crates.name: xai-grok-workspace-client
crates.description: Lightweight typed client for hub-proxied workspace.* RPCs (shared by xai-grok-shell proxy mode and other consumers)
crates.role: 提供经 Hub 代理调用远程 workspace RPC 的类型化客户端。

crates.name: xai-grok-workspace-types
crates.description: Wire types for the xAI workspace API (request/chunk/event enums shared by client and server)
crates.role: 定义远程 workspace 请求、分块响应和事件的 wire types。

crates.name: xai-hooks-plugins-types
crates.description: Shared DTO types for hooks/plugins ACP extensions (wire format only)
crates.role: 负责 hook 发现、命令执行、超时和策略拦截。

crates.name: xai-hunk-tracker
crates.description: Track file hunks (diffs) with agent/external attribution
crates.role: 追踪文件 diff hunk 并区分 Agent 与外部修改来源。

crates.name: xai-interjection-core
crates.description: Shared mid-turn interjection buffer and formatting for the client and server agent loops
crates.role: 提供 mid-turn interjection 缓冲、顺序控制和格式化。

crates.name: xai-mixpanel
crates.description: Lightweight Mixpanel HTTP tracking client (replaces mixpanel-rs to avoid pulling reqwest 0.11)
crates.role: 提供轻量 Mixpanel HTTP 事件发送客户端。

crates.name: xai-prompt-queue
crates.description: Shared prompt-queue wire types for xai-grok-shell and xai-grok-pager
crates.role: 定义跨 Shell 与 Pager 共享的 prompt queue 类型和队列语义。

crates.name: xai-ratatui-inline
crates.role: 支持在现有终端区域内嵌运行 ratatui 组件。

crates.name: xai-ratatui-textarea
crates.role: 实现 Unicode 感知的终端多行输入、选择和光标移动。

crates.name: xai-sqlite-journal
crates.description: Filesystem-aware SQLite journal-mode selection: WAL on local disks, rollback journal on network mounts where WAL's mmap'd -shm is unsafe
crates.role: 按文件系统能力选择安全的 SQLite journal 模式。

crates.name: xai-system-power
crates.description: Cross-platform system sleep/wake (suspend) notifications — used to defer work across a suspend boundary
crates.role: 提供跨平台休眠和唤醒通知。

crates.name: xai-test-utils
crates.description: Shared test utilities: hermetic git, optional runfiles helpers
crates.role: 集中提供密封测试环境、模拟服务和共享测试工具。

crates.name: xai-token-estimation
crates.description: Pure shared token-estimation primitives.
crates.role: 提供纯 token 估算原语，为预算与压缩决策提供近似值。

crates.name: xai-tool-protocol
crates.description: Wire-protocol types for the xAI Computer Hub
crates.role: 定义 Computer Hub 工具调用的稳定传输协议类型。

crates.name: xai-tool-runtime
crates.description: Unified Tool trait, dispatch trait, error taxonomy, notifications, and search index for the xAI Computer Hub
crates.role: 定义统一 Tool trait、分派、错误分类、通知和搜索索引。

crates.name: xai-tool-types
crates.description: Canonical tool-description types for the xAI platform
crates.role: 定义工具描述和 schema 等平台共享叶子类型。

crates.name: xai-tracing
crates.role: 提供跨模块共享的结构化 tracing 基础设施。

crates.name: xai-tracing-macros
crates.description: Tracing-based utility macros for timestamped logging and timing
crates.role: 提供基于 tracing 的时间戳和耗时记录宏。

crates.name: xai-tty-utils
crates.description: Lightweight process-spawning utilities for TTY safety — detach from controlling terminal, suppress interactive pagers, process-group lifecycle
crates.role: 封装 TTY 安全的子进程派生、pager 抑制和进程组回收。
